$comment: THEME WIRING — maps the semantic ROLES that components consume to the theme's brand-kit INPUTS (tokens/themes/*.json). Emitted ONCE under :root as var() references (confetti/css-declarations-refs), so it is theme-independent: overriding an input in a [data-theme] block repoints every role here via the cascade. This is what lets a demo re-skin the whole system by setting only a handful of input values. Neutral colour roles are NOT here — they live on the mode axis (tokens/modes/). References point at theme-input tokens; the layer audit allows semantic → theme-input.

button-lift.comment: the hover transform on filled buttons — a lift, or rest (no move), per theme

button-hover-brightness.comment: hover lightness multiplier for buttons that change lightness instead of lifting
